summary: Tested 'Minta Harga Khusus' (Request Special Price) feature - Backend API endpoints working correctly, but frontend testing blocked by navigation issues to POS/Sales Portal page.

minor_issues.issue: After approving a price approval, the effective endpoint returns has_special=false instead of true. The approval is created and approved successfully (status 200), but the effective price query doesn't return the approved special price.
minor_issues.impact: Special price may not apply to orders immediately after approval. Possible timing issue or entity_id mismatch in the query.
minor_issues.test_evidence: Backend test showed: Created approval pra_5bf3d1114395, approved successfully, but GET /api/price-approvals/effective returned has_special=False, price=0 (expected has_special=True, price=157250.0)

critical_bugs.issue: Unable to navigate to POS / Sales Portal page from dashboard. Clicking 'POS / Sales Portal' link in sidebar does not navigate to the sales view. Direct URL navigation to /sales also redirects back to dashboard.
critical_bugs.selector: Sidebar link 'POS / Sales Portal' under PENJUALAN section
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot test the new 'Minta Harga Khusus' feature in checkout flow as POS page is inaccessible
critical_bugs.test_evidence: Multiple attempts with different selectors (text=POS, a:has-text('Sales Portal'), JavaScript click) all failed. Page stays on Control Tower dashboard. PENJUALAN section can be expanded but clicking POS link has no effect.

passed_tests: Backend: Create price approval (POST /api/price-approvals) - Status 200, approval created with ID
Backend: Approve price approval (POST /api/price-approvals/{id}/approve) - Status 200, approval status changed to 'approved'
Backend: List price approvals (GET /api/price-approvals) - Status 200, created approval found in list
Frontend: Admin login via quick-login button works
Frontend: Dashboard loads correctly after login
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix POS / Sales Portal navigation. The sidebar link 'POS / Sales Portal' under PENJUALAN section is not navigating to the sales view. This blocks all testing of the new 'Minta Harga Khusus' feature in the checkout flow. Verify that: 1) The navId 'sales' is correctly wired to the SalesPortal component, 2) The sidebar link has correct onClick handler, 3) The route /sales is properly configured. Also investigate the backend issue where GET /api/price-approvals/effective returns has_special=false immediately after approval (possible entity_id mismatch or timing issue).

success_percentage.backend: 87.5% (7/8 tests passed, 1 warning on effective price query)
success_percentage.frontend: 0% (Cannot reach POS page to test the feature)

untested_features_due_to_blocking_issues: Checkout step 2 'Minta Harga Khusus' button visibility
Admin 'Setujui & Terapkan' button visibility and functionality
Form validation (price must be > 0 and < normal price)
Special price badge display after approval
Price application to cart item after approval
Persistence of approvals in 'Pusat Persetujuan' → 'Approval Harga'
Regression test: existing special price for 'Toko Kain Sejahtera' + 'Batik Mega Mendung'
notes: The backend implementation appears solid with all CRUD endpoints working. The modal component (RequestSpecialPriceModal.jsx) and checkout integration (CheckoutDrawer.jsx) code review shows proper data-testid attributes and correct logic flow. However, cannot verify actual UI behavior due to navigation blocker. Once navigation is fixed, comprehensive Playwright tests can be executed to verify: 1) Button visibility based on user role, 2) Modal form fields and validation, 3) Admin approve flow with immediate price application, 4) Sales request flow with pending status, 5) Special price badge display, 6) Integration with Pusat Persetujuan.
